title: aidia salicifolia
intro: Aidia salicifolia, also known as the "Gamboge tree", is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, particularly in the tropical forests of Thailand and Myanmar. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiproliferative effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Aidia salicifolia is commonly prepared as a tea or decoction, as well as being used in traditional herbal remedies and supplements to promote overall health and well-being.
